items.title: Amazon CloudFront
items.description: Amazon CloudFront for DVA-C02. Origins, distributions, cache behaviors, TTL, signed URLs vs signed cookies, OAC/OAI for S3, Lambda@Edge, CloudFront Functions, and HTTPS enforcement.

items.title: CDN & Load Balancing
items.description: Content Delivery Networks, edge caching, load balancing algorithms, health checks, session persistence, and global traffic management.

items.title: Handling Large Blobs
items.description: Patterns for storing and delivering large binary objects including images, videos, and files. Covers object storage, chunked uploads, multipart transfers, CDN delivery, and presigned URLs.

items.title: Scaling Reads
items.description: Strategies for handling high read QPS including caching layers, read replicas, CDN, CQRS, and database indexing. Covers Redis patterns, cache invalidation, and fan-out strategies.
